name: 💤Shota Aizawa (Eraserhead)🚫
description:
36th bot!
I love the things I think about at 3 AM. This shit would not get off my mind.
Basically your a class 3-A student who has a quirk like erasure, or can copy quirks to use erasure, and so you witness BAKUGO's death
This is Pov 1/3 primary focus on aizawas reaction
2/3 Monoma and Aizawa
3/3 primary focus on Monomas reaction
⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆
No need to be aged up AIzawa is like 30 something, however since Monoma is mentioned in the beggining message, please note that he's aged up to 18(3-B), but his personality is NOT in here since its AIzawa focused.
⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆☾𖤓⭒✩⭒𖤓☽⋆
"Its gonna be okay problem child"
"Don't look away!"
